About.title: About the event
About.subtitle: About the ITTC 2026  “International Transport and Transit Corridors
About.text: Connectivity and Development – 2026” (ITTC 2026) is an international forum and exhibition dedicated to the development of transport corridors, logistics, digital infrastructure, and international cooperation. The event brings together representatives of government authorities, international organizations, financial institutions, transport and logistics companies, investors, and industry experts to discuss current trends and prospects for the development of global transport connectivity. The Forum serves as a platform for professional dialogue, exchange of experience, and the development of practical solutions aimed at improving efficient transport routes, enhancing logistics processes, and strengthening international cooperation.

1.title: Transport Infrastructure and Logistics
1.text: Railway systems, road transport networks, multi-modal terminals, logistics hubs, and transport corridor development projects.

2.title: Maritime and Port Infrastructure
2.text: Port development technologies, Caspian Sea logistics, shipping services, container handling systems, and solutions for maritime connectivity.

3.title: Aviation and Air Cargo Transport
3.text: Air transport services, cargo airlines, airport infrastructure, aviation logistics hubs, and air transport technologies.

4.title: Digital Logistics and Intelligent Solutions
4.text: AI-based logistics systems, digital freight platforms, blockchain solutions, "smart customs," IoT, and supply chain digitalization.

5.title: Transport Technologies and Innovations
5.text: Smart mobility systems, autonomous transport solutions, tracking technologies, and intelligent transport systems (ITS).

6.title: Investment and Infrastructure Development
6.text: Public-private partnerships (PPP), financial institutions, infrastructure investment projects, and international development programs.

7.title: Sustainable Transport and Green Solutions
7.text: Eco-friendly logistics, low-carbon transport technologies, energy-efficient systems, and ESG-oriented solutions.

8.title: Trade and Industrial Services
8.text: Freight forwarding services, trade logistics, industrial equipment for the transport sector, and related services.

Sponsorship.title: Sponsorship opportunities
Sponsorship.text:
Partner with ITTC 2026 to position your brand at the center of innovation and collaboration. Our sponsorship packages are designed to maximize visibility, generate meaningful business connections, and create lasting engagement with industry professionals. 
 From brand recognition across conference channels to exclusive networking and exhibition opportunities, every package delivers measurable value while allowing you to choose the level of participation that best fits your goals.

1.question: How do I register for ITTC 2026?
1.answer: To register for the ITTC 2026 Conference, please complete the registration process via our official website. Once your application has been received, a delegate agreement will be sent to you. For assistance, contact: info@ittc.tm

2.question: When and where will ITTC 2026 take place?
2.answer: ITTC 2026 will be held in Ashgabat, Turkmenistan. The exact dates and venue will be announced on the official website and shared with all registered delegates.

3.question: Who can attend the conference?
3.answer: The conference is open to government representatives, industry professionals, investors and companies working in the transport, transit and logistics sectors. Media representatives may attend with prior accreditation.

4.question: Is there a participation fee?
4.answer: Participation terms, including any applicable fees, are outlined in the delegate agreement provided after registration. Please refer to your agreement or contact the organizers for details.

5.question: Do you provide visa support?
5.answer: Yes. Registered delegates who require an entry visa to Turkmenistan will receive an official invitation letter and guidance on the visa application process.

6.question: Will accommodation be arranged for participants?
6.answer: The organizers will provide a list of recommended hotels and partner rates. Delegates are responsible for booking their own accommodation unless otherwise stated in their agreement.

7.question: Where can I find the conference agenda?
7.answer: The full agenda, including sessions, speakers and side events, will be published on the official website and updated regularly before the event.

8.question: Who can I contact for more information?
8.answer: For any additional questions, please reach out to the organizing team by email at info@ittc.tm. Our team will be glad to assist you.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Protecting your data with transparency, security, and care.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.body: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the website oguzforum.com (hereinafter referred to as the "Website") and applies to all information that the Website Administration may obtain about the user while using the Website.

sections.title: 2. Data Collection
sections.body: We may collect the following data:
items: Personal data provided by the user (name, email address, phone number, etc.);
Website usage data (IP address, browser type, device information, etc.).

sections.title: 3. Data Usage
items: Improve website performance and user experience;
Communicate with users and respond to inquiries.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing with Third Parties
sections.body: We do not share users' personal data with third parties without their consent, except when required by law or necessary to provide our services.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.body: The Website Administration takes all reasonable organizational and technical measures to protect users' personal data from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: Your data is stored only as long as necessary to provide our services or meet legal requirements.

sections.title: 7. User Rights
items: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time.

sections.title: 8. Policy Updates
sections.body: We may update this policy. All changes will be posted on the website with the effective date.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, please contact us at:

You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not interfere with its operation, security, or accessibility. Any attempt to gain unauthorized access to the website, its systems, or related services is strictly prohibited.
